headline: International Flavors & Fragrances: Not The Best Investment Anymore
summary: IFF is downgraded to a Hold following a 13% stock gain and the announced sale of its food ingredients business. Learn more about IFF stock here.

headline: International Flavors (IFF) Down 11.3% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Rebound?
summary: International Flavors (IFF) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.
